summary: Solid multi-layer test suite with good coverage of core functionality. Unit tests comprehensively cover label assignment (10 tests), rule loading (5 tests), and most glob matching patterns (5 tests), but notably miss `?` and `[abc]` character class matching. Workflow structural tests verify triggers, jobs, and actionlint validation. Act-based integration tests with parametrized fixtures test end-to-end pipeline. However, several gaps reduce confidence: glob features ~15% untested, `--format json` CLI option not tested, file reading with comments/blank lines mentioned in code but untested, no character class edge cases. Fixtures are referenced but definitions not shown, making full integration coverage impossible to verify. Design is clean with good pytest idioms, helper functions, and separation of concerns, though external fixture dependencies are a concern. Would catch most regressions in core assignment logic and verify pipeline integration, but leave blind spots in glob patterns and CLI features.
